$Comment: Authoritative DEFAULT mob-scaling settings (the SIMPLE preset), decoded via MobScalingSettingsAsset.CODEC (Pattern A, PascalCase, NESTED sub-objects). This is the schema-authority default, read synchronously at plugin setup() so the zero-cost registration gate can see Enabled. Owners override any key in mods/MmoMobScaling/mob-scaling.json (same PascalCase codec shape, partial allowed - a nested group may be partially filled). Do NOT reintroduce Java-baked config defaults, loose camelCase JSON, or flat prefixed keys where a nested group exists.
$WorldOverridesComment: Per-world settings overlays (1.0.1). Each Match is fuzzy (exact > longest trailing-* prefix > *), so the _i*/_ii*/_iii* prefixes self-disambiguate AND catch suffixed instance worlds. Dungeon of Fear I + II have player/group scaling OFF (fixed difficulty); all three have distance-from-spawn escalation OFF. Unset leaves inherit the global settings; an owner file's WorldOverrides CONCATENATE with (and override same-Match) these shipped defaults.
